gates.name: Source Inventory Gate
gates.pass_condition: Source exists, family known, status assigned, owner/access/risk documented.
gates.fail_action: Block acquisition until inventory is complete.

gates.name: Acquisition & Preservation Gate
gates.pass_condition: Raw captured, source card created, manifest created, checksum created, no unexplained missing output.
gates.fail_action: Mark source as BLOCKED or REOPEN_REQUIRED.

gates.name: Persistence Gate
gates.pass_condition: file exists -> in KAP -> tracked -> committed -> pushed -> visible on GitHub
gates.fail_action: Block pipeline advancement. Trigger Git disaster recovery runbook.

gates.name: Routing Gate
gates.pass_condition: Item classified, domain assigned, sensitivity assigned, ambiguous high-value items flagged for review.
gates.fail_action: Route to ARCHIVE_ONLY and flag for manual Architect review.

gates.name: Delta Gate
gates.pass_condition: Previous state loaded, new state compared, new/changed/deleted detected, delta manifest created, source registry updated.
gates.fail_action: Revert to previous known state. Block downstream processing.
